creator: spambox@haruhiism.net
text:
(In reply to Harlan Stenn from comment #8)
There should only be one line and you do not want any to be active. You can simply delete that file, though it will be re-installed with the package whenever it updates.

It seems sshguard 2.0 monitors the auth log by default and does not really need syslogd pipes (or at least the pf variant does).
